rationale: Schamp et al. (2023) is cited repeatedly in core framing and theory-development passages, not merely in a background list. The citing paper uses that meta-analysis to summarize established experimental CMP findings and to argue that prior work focused on simplified settings and campaign-design factors. It then positions its own contribution as addressing what that stream does not cover: field sales lift and contextual moderators in real FMCG retail environments. This indicates a clear build-on function for the cited paper.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on Schamp et al. (2023) as the prior synthesis of CMP effectiveness and explicitly extends it to a new empirical setting. It moves from lab-focused consumer-response evidence to field-based sales effects and contextual moderation at the point of sale.
